cards.back: The process of dividing data into manageable chunks, assigning a header and trailer, and adding error-checking bits to ensure data integrity.
A mechanism that regulates the rate at which data is sent over a link, preventing network congestion and overflow.
A set of techniques used to detect and correct errors that occur during data transmission, ensuring data integrity and reliability.
A communication model where data is transmitted without establishing a dedicated connection, and packets may be routed independently.
A communication model where data is transmitted over a dedicated connection, and packets are routed together as a single unit.
